ggsegKong 1.0.1
  • Reference

Kong 2022 Areal MS-HBM 17-Network Atlases

Source: R/kong2022.R
kong2022_100.Rd

Brain atlases for the Kong et al. (2022) Areal MS-HBM cortical parcellation aligned to 17 resting-state networks. Available in 100 to 1000 parcel configurations. Contains both 2D polygon geometry for ggseg::geom_brain() and 3D vertex indices for ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

kong2022_100()

kong2022_200()

kong2022_300()

kong2022_400()

kong2022_500()

kong2022_600()

kong2022_700()

kong2022_800()

kong2022_900()

kong2022_1000()

Value

A ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

References

Kong R, et al. (2022). "Individual-Specific Areal-Level Parcellations Improve Functional Connectivity Prediction of Behavior." Cerebral Cortex, 31(10):4477-4500. doi:10.1093/cercor/bhab101

See also

Other ggseg_atlases: kong2019()

Other cortical_atlases: kong2019()

Examples

kong2022_100()
#> 
#> ── kong2022_100 ggseg atlas ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 100
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 100 × 3
#>     hemi  region                            label                               
#>     <chr> <chr>                             <chr>                               
#>   1 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC       
#>   2 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_pCun       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_pCun      
#>   3 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL       
#>   4 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_1     lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_1    
#>   5 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_2     lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_2    
#>   6 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_1     lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_1    
#>   7 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_2     lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_2    
#>   8 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp      
#>   9 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_TempPole   lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_TempPole  
#>  10 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_IPL        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_IPL       
#>  11 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC       
#>  12 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd      
#>  13 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm      
#>  14 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_RSC        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_RSC       
#>  15 left  17networks_LH_ContC_PCC           lh_17networks_LH_ContC_PCC          
#>  16 left  17networks_LH_ContB_FPole         lh_17networks_LH_ContB_FPole        
#>  17 left  17networks_LH_ContB_OFC           lh_17networks_LH_ContB_OFC          
#>  18 left  17networks_LH_ContB_Temp          lh_17networks_LH_ContB_Temp         
#>  19 left  17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_1         lh_17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_1        
#>  20 left  17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_2         lh_17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_2        
#>  21 left  17networks_LH_ContA_PrCv          lh_17networks_LH_ContA_PrCv         
#>  22 left  17networks_LH_ContA_Temp          lh_17networks_LH_ContA_Temp         
#>  23 left  17networks_LH_Language_Temp       lh_17networks_LH_Language_Temp      
#>  24 left  17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_FrMed   lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_FrMed  
#>  25 left  17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_Ins_1   lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_Ins_1  
#>  26 left  17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_Ins_2   lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_Ins_2  
#>  27 left  17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_PFCl    lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_PFCl   
#>  28 left  17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_SPL     lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnB_SPL    
#>  29 left  17networks_LH_SalVenAttnA_ParOper lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnA_ParOper
#>  30 left  17networks_LH_SalVenAttnA_PrC     lh_17networks_LH_SalVenAttnA_PrC    
#>  31 left  17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_PrCd      lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_PrCd     
#>  32 left  17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_SPL       lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnB_SPL      
#>  33 left  17networks_LH_DorsAttnA_PostC     lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnA_PostC    
#>  34 left  17networks_LH_DorsAttnA_SPL       lh_17networks_LH_DorsAttnA_SPL      
#>  35 left  17networks_LH_Aud_Ins             lh_17networks_LH_Aud_Ins            
#>  36 left  17networks_LH_SomMotB_1           lh_17networks_LH_SomMotB_1          
#>  37 left  17networks_LH_SomMotB_2           lh_17networks_LH_SomMotB_2          
#>  38 left  17networks_LH_SomMotA_1           lh_17networks_LH_SomMotA_1

#>  42 left  17networks_LH_SomMotA_5           lh_17networks_LH_SomMotA_5          
#>  43 left  17networks_LH_VisualC             lh_17networks_LH_VisualC

#>  46 left  17networks_LH_VisualB_3           lh_17networks_LH_VisualB_3          
#>  47 left  17networks_LH_VisualB_4           lh_17networks_LH_VisualB_4          
#>  48 left  17networks_LH_VisualA_1           lh_17networks_LH_VisualA_1          
#>  49 left  17networks_LH_VisualA_2           lh_17networks_LH_VisualA_2          
#>  50 left  17networks_LH_VisualA_TempOcc     lh_17networks_LH_VisualA_TempOcc    
#>  51 right 17networks_RH_DefaultC_PHC        rh_17networks_RH_DefaultC_PHC       
#>  52 right 17networks_RH_ContC_pCun          rh_17networks_RH_ContC_pCun         
#>  53 right 17networks_RH_DefaultB_IPL        rh_17networks_RH_DefaultB_IPL

#>  58 right 17networks_RH_DefaultA_Temp       rh_17networks_RH_DefaultA_Temp

#>  69 right 17networks_RH_ContA_IPS_1         rh_17networks_RH_ContA_IPS_1

#>  71 right 17networks_RH_ContA_PrCv          rh_17networks_RH_ContA_PrCv

#>  73 right 17networks_RH_Language_Temp       rh_17networks_RH_Language_Temp

#>  77 right 17networks_RH_ContC_PFCl          rh_17networks_RH_ContC_PFCl         
#>  78 right 17networks_RH_SalVenAttnA_SPL     rh_17networks_RH_SalVenAttnA_SPL

if (FALSE) plot(kong2022_100()) # \dontrun{}
kong2022_200()
#> 
#> ── kong2022_200 ggseg atlas ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 200
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

#>     hemi  region                            label                               
#>     <chr> <chr>                             <chr>

#>   2 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC
